ddt:Target.Name: DDCR - BE93 - v5.1
ddt:Target.Description:
Injection Common Rail DELPHI DDCR
Applications : X84 / Micra Logiciels : C4IB / BE93 et ultérieurs
Date : 14/01/2005 Auteur : Sonia SCRIGNAC Email : sonia.scrignac@delphi.com Tel. : 33 (0)1 69 27 79 02 API : FR CTL L49 2 65
--------------------------------------------------- Documents de référence
DTC et données d'environnements :
Datas, trames et services :
--------------------------------------------------- Historique
Version 5.1: Traitement des données en 32bits signées.
Version 5.0 : Ajout du traitement de la donnée IM_EOL_Priming_done_NVV Modification du service ECUReset ($11) (--> Ajout d'un mode de reset et renommage des anciens modes) Modification du VDiag
Version 4.3 : Modification de la longueur de la trame OBD pour mise en conformité avec le spécification de référence Diagnostique. Modification du nombre de décimales visibles pour plusieurs varaibles peu lisible (EGR_feedback, EGR_Demand, VGT_so_final_PWM, Pedal_position...)
Version 4.2 : Modification de la donnée Diagnostic Mode Modification des données d'environnements de la FF_GR6 associée aux DTC 400 et 409
Version 4.1 : Modification des noms des Freeze Frames pour permettre leur affichage. Modification d'écrans.
Version 4.0 : Création pour le logiciel BE92 (C4IA1) Mise à jour des variables contenues dans les trames (formules de conversion) Mise à jour des trames de données Ajout du DTC C100, status 07 : allumage du voyant MIL sur une perte de la connexion CAN avec la BVA.

Data.Name: Air extern Temperature
Data.Comment: température de l'air vu par le calculateur pour l'agrément de conduite

Data.Name: Air extern temperature_
Data.Comment: air extern temperature for freeze frame

Data.Name: Air Inlet Temperature_
Data.Comment: Air Inlet Temperature for freeze frame

Data.Name: Air mass flow
Data.Comment: valeur de débit d'air réelle ou estimée

Data.Name: Air Mass Flow Demand_
Data.Comment: Air mass flow demand for freeze frame

Data.Name: Air Mass Flow Linearised_
Data.Comment: Air mass flow linearised for freeze frame

Data.Name: Air mass flow_
Data.Comment: air mass flow for freeze frame

Data.Name: allumage voyant MIL par OBD
Data.Comment: demande d'allumage du voyant MIL au TdB par CAN ou filaire

Data.Name: AOS_fuel_trim
Data.Comment: fuel trim added or subtracted to damp any speed oscillation during

Data.Name: APS_sync_state
Data.Comment: this indicates the state of the synchronising of the APS system

Data.Name: Atmospheric Pressure
Data.Comment: pression atmosphérique vu par le calculateur (capteur interne ou externe)

Data.Name: Atmospheric Pressure Linearised_
Data.Comment: atmospheric pressure linearised for freeze frame

Item.Text: engine stop request from Airbag Crash

Data.Name: Boost Pressure
Data.Comment: pression dans le collecteur admission utilisé pour reconstituer le débit d'air

Data.Name: brake_depressed
Data.Comment: indicates that either the brake light switch or the brake safety

Data.Name: C2I cylinder
Data.Comment: donnée de corrections individualisées de l'injecteur pour tous les cylindres

Data.Name: C2I cylinder 1
Data.Comment: donnée de corrections individualisées de l'injecteur pour le cylindre 1

Data.Name: C2I cylinder 2
Data.Comment: donnée de corrections individualisées de l'injecteur pour le cylindre 2

Data.Name: C2I cylinder 3
Data.Comment: donnée de corrections individualisées de l'injecteur pour le cylindre 3

Data.Name: C2I cylinder 4
Data.Comment: donnée de corrections individualisées de l'injecteur pour le cylindre 4

Item.Text: C2i of cylinder 1 has been successfully written
C2i of cylinder 2 has been successfully written
C2i of cylinder 2 and 1 has been successfully written
C2i of cylinder 3 has been successfully written
C2i of cylinder 3 and 1 has been successfully written
C2i of cylinder 3 and 2 has been successfully written
C2i of cylinder 3 and 2 and 1 a has been successfully written
C2i of cylinder 4 has been successfully written
C2i of cylinder 4 and 1 has been successfully written
C2i of cylinder 4 and 2 has been successfully written
C2i of cylinder 4 and 2 and 1 has been successfully written
C2i of cylinder 4 and 3 has been successfully written
C2i of cylinder 4 and 3 and 1 has been successfully written
C2i of cylinder 4 and 3 and 2 has been successfully written

Data.Name: Cnxbtvol
Data.Comment: state change detection one of 4 steering wheel switches

Data.Name: Cnxfr3
Data.Comment: state change detection on oêned brake switch

Data.Name: Cnxlv
Data.Comment: state change detection LV position with security on configuration detection (on/off and off/on)

Data.Name: Cnxrv
Data.Comment: state change detection RV position with security on configuration detection (on/off and off/on)

Data.Name: Collector pressure demand_
Data.Comment: Collector pressure demand for freeze frame

Data.Name: Configuration auto gear box
Data.Comment: configuration véhicule avec boite de vitesse automatique

Data.Name: Configuration cold loop
Data.Comment: configuration climatisation Boucle Froide filaire reonnue

Data.Name: Configuration cold loop CAN
Data.Comment: configuration Climatisation boucle froide CAN reonnue

Data.Name: Configuration quickshift
Data.Comment: configuration véhicule avec boite de vitesse robotisée

Data.Name: Configuration regulator/limitor speed
Data.Comment: configuration véhicule avec regulateur et limiteur de vitesse

Data.Name: Couple calculé mode2
Data.Comment: couple calculé au roue et stocké en OBD mode 2

Item.Text: fonctions CC/SL not presents on vehicle
CC and SL inactive (OFF, in waking or suspend)

Data.Name: Current Time Rise_
Data.Comment: Current Time Rise for freeze fame

Data.Name: Dacacm
Data.Comment: Deactivation due to engine control problem

Data.Name: Dacappvv
Data.Comment: Deactivation due to vehicle speed default

Data.Name: Dacarvlv
Data.Comment: Deactivation due to C/SL failure detection

Data.Name: Dacnpm
Data.Comment: Deactivation due to AGB at neutral detection

Data.Name: Dacnrvit
Data.Comment: Deactivation because set speed/vehicle speed ratio is incoherent

Data.Name: Dacnsusp
Data.Comment: Deactivation due to suspend switch press

Data.Name: Decrease vehicle speed_
Data.Comment: decreas vehicle speed for freeze frame

Item.Text: posting and memo defauts CAN mute/absent not authorised
posting and memo defauts CAN mute/absent authorised
assembly line testing and after-sales session
Turbo Charger Bypass Valve Control Circuit
Fuel Rail / System pressure - Too Low
Fuel Composition Sensor Circuit/Water in Fuel
Internal Control Module Random Access Memory (RAM) Error
Engine Hot Lamp Output Control Circuit
Engine Coolant Heater "A" Relay Control Circuit
Engine Coolant Heater "B" Relay Control Circuit
Engine Coolant Heater "C" Relay Control Circuit

Data.Name: EGR activation
Data.Comment: output activated & tested by Static test

Data.Name: EGR control state_
Data.Comment: EGR control state for freeze frame

Data.Name: EGR drive duty cycle
Data.Comment: RCO de commande de la vanne EGR

Data.Name: EGR feedback
Data.Comment: lecture du retour du taux d'egr

Data.Name: EGR position offset_
Data.Comment: EGR position offset for freeze frame

Data.Name: EGR throttle state_
Data.Comment: EGR throttle state for freeze frame

Data.Name: EGR valve actuator
Data.Comment: info de commande de la vanne EGR

Data.Name: Engine performance reduction
Data.Comment: performance moteur réduite du à un défaut détecté par le système

Data.Name: Engine security test
Data.Comment: coupure moteur suite à une demande logiciel

Item.Text: not default injection gravity 2 tied motor stop
default injection gravity 2 tied motor stop
not start up of GMV1 (low speed)
not start up of GMV2 (high speed)

Data.Name: ExternalTemp_84
Data.Comment: température de l'air extern vu par le calculateur UCH

Data.Name: Fault mileage
Data.Comment: kilométrage effectué avec la panne présente

Item.Text: Turbo Charger Bypass Valve Control Circuit
Fuel Rail / System pressure - Too Low
Fuel Composition Sensor Circuit/Water in Fuel
Internal Control Module Random Access Memory (RAM) Error
Engine Hot Lamp Output Control Circuit
Engine Coolant Heater "A" Relay Control Circuit
Engine Coolant Heater "B" Relay Control Circuit
Engine Coolant Heater "C" Relay Control Circuit

Data.Name: Frein 3
Data.Comment: Wire connection opened brake switch input (normally closed)

Data.Name: Freon pressure
Data.Comment: pression de fréon mesuré dans le circuit

Data.Name: Fuel Pump Secondary activation
Data.Comment: sortie détectée et testée par le test statique

Data.Name: Fuel Pump Secondary actuator
Data.Comment: info de commande de l'actionneur IMV

Data.Name: Fuel Temperature
Data.Comment: température du gazoil en interne pompe

Data.Name: Fuel Temperature Linearised_
Data.Comment: Fuel temperature linearised for freeze frame

Data.Name: gravity 1 recorder kilometer
Data.Comment: compteur kilométrique avec le voyant gravité 1 allumé

Data.Name: Hardware No
Data.Comment: reference HARD du calculateur en B.C.D

Data.Name: IM_current_demand
Data.Comment: current trim for the IM valve, calculated from the pressure error

Data.Name: IMV ctrl state_
Data.Comment: IMV control state for freeze frame

Data.Name: Inj_bal_delta_speed_0
Data.Comment: difference in the instantaneous speed for line to line

Data.Name: Inj_bal_delta_speed_1
Data.Comment: difference in the instantaneous speed for line to line

Data.Name: Inj_bal_delta_speed_2
Data.Comment: difference in the instantaneous speed for line to line

Data.Name: Inj_bal_delta_speed_3
Data.Comment: difference in the instantaneous speed for line to line

Data.Name: Injector cylinder 2 actuator
Data.Comment: info de commande de l'injecteur du cylindre 2

Data.Name: Injector cylinder 3 actuator
Data.Comment: info de commande de l'injecteur du cylindre 3

Data.Name: Injector cylinder 4 actuator
Data.Comment: info de commande de l'injecteur du cylindre 4

Data.Name: Injector_HSD_monitor_voltage
Data.Comment: injector high side drive monitor voltage

Data.Name: memo_recept_trame_crash_coherent
Data.Comment: diag byte stored upon reception of a coherent AIRBAG Crash frame

Data.Name: N° du PID OBD
Data.Comment: DTC OBD enregistré dans la freeze frame

Data.Name: Num_of_update_failures
Data.Comment: nombre de recalage echoué sur non convergence

Data.Name: Number cycle with current fault
Data.Comment: nombre de cycle avec défaut présent

Data.Name: Number cycle with memory fault
Data.Comment: nombre de cycle avec le défaut mémorisé

Data.Name: Number_out_of_zone
Data.Comment: nombre de recalage echoué sur sortie de zoneréussi

Data.Name: OBD legal conditions
Data.Comment: OBD legal conditions (Teau et Tair >7°c, Patm>seuil et Low_fuel_warning=0)

Data.Name: OBD Warm up cycle
Data.Comment: Key on et Teau>seuil + delta teau>seuil

Data.Name: Other system specifics
Data.Comment: utilisé pour le VMAP et la date synthèse calib en Hexa

Data.Name: Period_off_1_corrected
Data.Comment: durée de séparation entre le pulse pilote et l'avance calculée de la pilote

Data.Name: Period_off_2_corrected
Data.Comment: durée de séparation entre le pulse pilote 2 et l'avance calculée pilote 2

Data.Name: Period_off_3_corrected
Data.Comment: durée de séparation entre le pulse principal et l'avance calculée pour le pulse principal

Data.Name: Period_on_2_corrected
Data.Comment: durée totale du pulse pilote 2 ou du pulse principal si pas de pilote

Data.Name: PID supporté
Data.Comment: n° de PID remonté par l'OBD

Data.Name: Piece No
Data.Comment: Reference du boitier programme (hard + soft + calib)

Data.Name: Pm1cfre-ECM
Data.Comment: One of brake switch memorised failure

Data.Name: Pm1cfre-UCH
Data.Comment: One of brake switch memorised failure

Data.Name: Pm2cfre
Data.Comment: Both of brake switch memorised failure

Data.Name: Pmcomvol
Data.Comment: Steering wheel control buttons memorised failure

Data.Name: porteur CLim_1
Data.Comment: carrier for data received from BCM

Data.Name: porteur CLim_2
Data.Comment: carrier for data received from AT

Data.Name: porteur CLim_3
Data.Comment: carrier for data received from ECM

Data.Name: porteur CLim_4
Data.Comment: carrier for data received from ECM

Data.Name: porteur ECM_GeneralStatus_1
Data.Comment: carrier 1 for data producted from ECM General status

Data.Name: porteur ECM_GeneralStatus_2
Data.Comment: carrier 2 for data producted from ECM General status

Data.Name: porteur ECM_SystemControl_1
Data.Comment: carrier 1 for data producted from ECM System control

Data.Name: porteur ECM_SystemControl_2
Data.Comment: carrier 2 for data producted from ECM System control

Data.Name: porteur ECM_SystemControl_3
Data.Comment: carrier 3 for data producted from ECM System control

Data.Name: porteur ECM_to_AT
Data.Comment: carrier for data producted from ECM to AT

Data.Name: porteur ECM_TorqueControl
Data.Comment: carrier for data producted from ECM Torque control

Data.Name: porteur Etat DSM
Data.Comment: donne les différent état géré par le gestionnaire de pannes

Data.Name: porteur état OBD
Data.Comment: donne les différents états du gestionnaire OBD

Data.Name: porteur RVL_1
Data.Comment: carrier for data received from BCM

Data.Name: porteur RVL_2
Data.Comment: carrier for data received from BCM

Data.Name: porteur RVL_3
Data.Comment: carrier for physical data acquired from ECM

Data.Name: porteur RVL_4
Data.Comment: carrier for physical data acquired from ECM

Data.Name: porteur RVL_5
Data.Comment: carrier for data producted by ECM

Data.Name: porteur RVL_6
Data.Comment: carrier for data producted by ECM

Data.Name: porteur RVL_7
Data.Comment: carrier for data producted by ECM

Data.Name: porteur RVL_8
Data.Comment: carrier for data producted by ECM

Data.Name: porteur VSC_1
Data.Comment: carrier for data received from AT

Data.Name: porteur VSC_2
Data.Comment: carrier for data received from UPC

Data.Name: porteur VSC_3
Data.Comment: carrier for physical data acquired from ECM

Data.Name: porteur VSC_4
Data.Comment: carrier for data produced by ECM

Data.Name: porteur VSC_5
Data.Comment: carrier for data produced by ECM

Data.Name: Power relay state_
Data.Comment: Power relay state for freeze frame

Data.Name: Pp1cfre-ECM
Data.Comment: One of brake switch current failure

Data.Name: Pp1cfre-UCH
Data.Comment: One of brake switch current failure

Data.Name: Pp2cfre
Data.Comment: Both of brake switch current failure

Data.Name: Ppcomvol
Data.Comment: Steering wheel control buttons current failure

Data.Name: PPH_control_state
Data.Comment: this indicates the state of PRE/POST Heating

Data.Name: Prail sensor linearised voltage_
Data.Comment: Prail sensoe linearised voltage for freeze frame

Data.Name: Pre/Heating relay actuator
Data.Comment: info de commande du relais de préchauffage

Data.Name: Pression Collecteur Linearised_
Data.Comment: Pression collecteur linearised for freeze frame

Data.Name: Pression collecteur mode2
Data.Comment: Intake manifold absolute pressure stocké en OBD mode 2

Data.Name: Prod_tram_diag_foct_clim_zn1
Data.Comment: producer of parameter area n°1 for functionnal climate control diagnosis frame

Data.Name: Prod_tram_diag_foct_clim_zn2
Data.Comment: producer of parameter area n°2 for functionnal climate control diagnosis frame

Data.Name: Prod_tram_diag_foct_clim_zn3
Data.Comment: producer of parameter area n°3 for functionnal climate control diagnosis frame

Data.Name: Prod_tram_diag_foct_clim_zn4
Data.Comment: producer of parameter area n°4 for functionnal climate control diagnosis frame

Data.Name: Prod_tram_diag_foct_rlv_zn1
Data.Comment: producer of parameter area n°1 for functionnal cruise control and speed limiter diagnosis frame

Data.Name: Prod_tram_diag_foct_rlv_zn2
Data.Comment: producer of parameter area n°2 for functionnal cruise control and speed limiter diagnosis frame

Data.Name: Prod_tram_diag_foct_rlv_zn3
Data.Comment: producer of parameter area n°3 for functionnal cruise control and speed limiter diagnosis frame

Data.Name: Prod_tram_diag_foct_vsc_zn1
Data.Comment: producer of parameter area n°1 for functionnal vsc engine states control diagnosis frame

Data.Name: Prod_tram_diag_foct_vsc_zn2
Data.Comment: producer of parameter area n°2 for functionnal vsc engine states control diagnosis frame

Data.Name: Prod_tram_diag_foct_vsc_zn3
Data.Comment: producer of parameter area n°3 for functionnal vsc engine states control diagnosis frame

Data.Name: Protected state
Data.Comment: Boolean indicating whether status is protected

Data.Name: Protected_state
Data.Comment: Boolean indicating whether status is protected

Data.Name: Rail pressure demand_
Data.Comment: rail pressure dempand for freeze frame

Data.Name: Rail pressure feedback_
Data.Comment: Rail pressure feedback for freeze fame

Data.Name: Rail pressure linearised_
Data.Comment: Rail pressure linearised for freeze fame

Data.Name: Raw Battery Voltage_
Data.Comment: Raw battery voltage for freeze frame

Data.Name: recovery mode activation
Data.Comment: enclenchement d'un mode dégradé (fuel_reducted, CE lamp...)

Data.Name: Régime mode2
Data.Comment: régime moteur correspondant au mode 2 OBD

Data.Name: Row Sensor Voltage_
Data.Comment: Raw sensor voltage for freeze frame

Data.Name: RV LV sensor voltage_
Data.Comment: Rv Lv Sensor voltage for freeze frame

Data.Name: Sensor Voltage linearised_
Data.Comment: sensor voltage linearised for freeze frame

Item.Text: assembly line testing and after-sales session

Data.Name: Soft engine stop request
Data.Comment: activation de la stratégie de coupure moteur temporisée

Item.Text: memory fault - short circuit to ground
memory fault - short circuit at battery
memory fault - parameter at limit min
memory fault - parameter at limit max
memory fault - value out of range
memory fault - open circuit or short circuit to ground
memory fault - open circuit or short circuit to battery
current fault - short circuit to ground
current fault - short circuit at battery
current fault - parameter at limit min
current fault - parameter at limit max
current fault - value out of range
current fault - open circuit or short circuit to ground
current fault - open circuit or short circuit to battery
memory fault - noise on injector line
memory fault - IM current trim low fuel high
memory fault - IM current trim high fuel high
memory fault - IM current trim low fuel low
memory fault - IM current trimhigh fuel low
current fault - noise on injector line
current fault - IM current trim low fuel high
current fault - IM current trim high fuel high
current fault - IM current trim low fuel low
current fault - IM current trimhigh fuel low

Data.Name: Supplier No
Data.Comment: Numero ITG du fournisseur en ASCII

Data.Name: Température eau mode2
Data.Comment: température eau stocké en OBD mode 2

Data.Name: test_trame_crash_coherent
Data.Comment: byte upon reception of AIRBAG Crash frame coherent

Item.Text: the torque exact can't be obtain (measure imprecision)
transitive state perturbing the realisation of torque consign

Data.Name: Ucollecteur
Data.Comment: information électrique capteur pression collecteur admission

Data.Name: vbx_ptc_idle_spd_inc
Data.Comment: engine idle speeded-up request from UCH

Data.Name: Vehicle distance
Data.Comment: distance totale parcourue par le véhicule

Data.Name: VGT_so_final_PWM
Data.Comment: RCO de commande du turbo à géométrie variable

Data.Name: VGT_so_state
Data.Comment: etat de commande du turbo à géométrie variable

Data.Name: Vitesse véhicule mode2
Data.Comment: Vitesse véhicule stocké en OBD mode 2

Data.Name: VLC_fuel_offset_nvt0
Data.Comment: Memorized fuel offset for VLC strategy

Data.Name: VLC_fuel_offset_nvt1
Data.Comment: Memorized fuel offset for VLC strategy

Data.Name: Waste gate ctrl state_
Data.Comment: Etat control waste gate for freeze frame

Data.Name: Air inlet Temperature
Data.Comment: température d'air interne vu par le calculateur pour le recalcul du débit d'air (air collecteur)

Data.Name: Water_in_fuel_connected_NVV
Data.Comment: Vehicle configuration with water un fuel sensor

Data.Name: Injector cylinder 1 actuator
Data.Comment: info de commande de l'injecteur du cylindre 1

Item.Text: No possible classification about the type of fault
Open circuit or Short circuit to ground
Open circuit or Short circuit to battery

Data.Name: IM_EOL_Priming_done_NVV
Data.Comment: Completion of the first pump housing filling

Item.Text: IM current trim low fuel high
IM current trim high fuel high
IM current trim low fuel low

Output Control
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic testing screen
